message: Click the arrow in the title bar to send a new command
Make sure to scroll through the console, auto-scroll is not enabled
Click the arrow in the title bar to send a new command
Click the arrow in the title bar to send a new command
Do you want to erase everything on UziVM? If yes, type 'i am sure'
wipe - wipe the entire file system and console
whoami - check what browser you are running Uzi in
del (dir/file) (name) - delete a file or directory
write (file location) (contents) - write data to a file
contents (file location) - print the contents of a file
list (dir) - list files in a directory
export - export your session as uzijson
import - import a session as uzijson
audio - upload a .mp3 or .wav and save it to Uzi as a .uzia or UziAudio file
